====[[Pokémon Legends: Z-A]]====
In {{g|Legends: Z-A}}, several NPCs around [[Lumiose City]] discuss Diantha, revealing that she focused on her acting career after her defeat as Champion. An advertisement can be found in [[Bleu Sector 7]] for Diantha's latest [[Movies in the Pokémon world|film]], ''The Suffering of a Carnation'', the title of which is a reference to her own Japanese name.

=====[[Mega Dimension]]=====
While Diantha herself does not appear in the game, it is revealed she has a daughter named [[Ansha]], who mentions that Diantha is in a faraway [[region]] filming a movie. Ansha's dream is to find the [[Legendary Pokémon]] {{p|Rayquaza}} in [[Hyperspace Lumiose]] and gift it to her mom. She also was the one who taught [[Jacinthe]] about [[Pokémon battle|Pokémon battling]], with her {{TP|Diantha|Gardevoir}} cited as the inspiration behind Jacinthe specializing in {{t|Fairy}} types. Although Ansha eventually lets the {{player}} keep Rayquaza, she is able to provide a pleasant gift for her mother with her donuts and stories.
{{left clear}}
